title: Features — Mioca autonomous business OS (coming soon)
description: What Mioca does: runs acquisition, support, delivery, and improvement with decisions, proves it deterministically, and keeps control through an approval gate. Coming soon.
ogTitle: Mioca features — executes autonomously, proves deterministically, stays under control
heading: What the autonomous OS actually does
lead: Mioca runs decisions-with-execution, not just tasks. Here's the breakdown — only what it can actually do, no exaggeration.

cards.title: Executes autonomously
cards.body: From acquisition to support, delivery, and improvement, it proposes the next move and — once approved — carries it out. You just hand it the goal.

cards.title: Proves it deterministically
cards.body: Every number can be recomputed from the same input, signed for tamper-detection. Hand your results straight to an audit.
cards.tag: Solo: peace of mind · Team: audit & governance

cards.title: Stays under control
cards.body: High-risk actions — publishing, shipping, charging — always pass a human approval gate. Even running itself, control stays in your hands.
cards.tag: Solo: no runaway · Team: internal controls

blocks.label: SCOPE
blocks.heading: Where it works (channels)
points: Generating and shipping articles, landing pages, and social posts
Adjusting listings and prices (all via the approval gate)
blocks.note: Channels expand over time. Anything law or terms require a human for — account creation, identity verification — stays with a human, never the machine.

blocks.label: HONESTY
blocks.heading: When it can't, it says so
blocks.lead: Low-confidence output is held for a human, not published. It never invents numbers. Since it's pre-launch, the figures shown on the landing page are illustrations.

ctaBody: We'll tell you first when it opens. Indicative pricing goes to the waitlist first, too.
